body:
Mirrors literature-template#37 so the deploy stack stays identical across the template family:

- **deploy-sepo-site action**: bounded retries with backoff for transient HTTP (000/408/409/425/429/5xx) on both the OIDC token fetch and the deploy POST, 30s curl timeouts, temp-file response handling with a cleanup trap, and strict single-line `http(s)` URL validation of the deploy response.
- **agent-deploy-site-main.yml**: canonical deploys now guarded by `github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'`.
- **checkout/setup-node v4 → v5** in `deploy.yml`, `agent-deploy-site-main.yml`, `agent-site-preview.yml` (`upload-artifact@v4` is current and stays).

Based on `main` — independent of the #3 → #4 stack. Workflow-validation and shell-check lanes pass (79/79, 15/15).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KSJ1viQV4pp3hcWo9u5oPV

title: Harden deploy-sepo-site action; deploy workflows to v5 actions
